title: rourea pubescens var. spadicea
intro: Rourea pubescens var. spadicea, also known as the Spotted Rourea or Red-flowered Rourea, is a plant species in the family Connaraceae, native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rourea pubescens var. spadicea include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and even exhibit antiparasitic properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
